message: Hello, my maximum bid for the unit will be 40 this round, I will only trade if your ask is ≤ 40.
Hello B1. Unfortunately 40 won't work for me — my costs are above that. I'd need at least 55 to make this worthwhile. Let's find a price that works for both of us over these 20 rounds.
Your 51 bid shows we can trade. I'll ask 50 next round. If you bid higher, I'll ask higher—let's build profitable trades.
